title: Lizzy 20 Pack Unscented Votive Candles| Natural Colour Wax Candles with 9-Hour Burn Time | 5cm x 3.7cm | for Weddings, Events, Home Décor, Table Centrepieces, Candle Holders (Pack of 20)
features: Versatile Unscented Votive Candles for All Occasions This 20-pack of classic votive candles is perfect for weddings, dinner parties, spa treatments, religious events, and everyday home ambience without overpowering fragrance.
Long-Lasting Burn Time for Extended Use Each votive candle offers an approximate burn time of 9 hours, making them ideal for evening events, long dinners, or overnight decorative lighting.
Standard Votive Size Fits Most Holders Measuring 5cm high and 3.7cm in diameter, these candles are designed to fit standard votive holders, lanterns, or decorative centrepieces for a seamless look.
Clean, Natural Appearance The candles come in a neutral, natural colour to complement any décor style. Their clean design enhances both modern and traditional settings.
Quality Wax with Steady Flame Made from durable wax, these votive candles produce a steady, consistent flame that creates a warm and inviting atmosphere in any indoor or outdoor setting.
description: Create a calm and inviting ambience with this 20-pack of Unscented Votive Candles. Whether you're setting the mood for a romantic dinner, hosting a wedding reception, or simply adding gentle illumination to your living space, these candles are a timeless choice. Each votive measures 5cm high by 3.7cm in diameter, fitting most standard holders with ease. Crafted from high-quality wax, these unscented candles offer a burn time of approximately 9 hours per candle—perfect for long events or multiple uses. Their neutral natural colour complements a wide variety of decorative schemes, from minimalist and modern to rustic and traditional. Perfect for use in table centrepieces, spa settings, or during power outages, these votives combine practicality with elegance. Because they are fragrance-free, they are ideal for use in shared or scent-sensitive environments.
